title: The Fuck Around / Find Out Principle
description: An informal law of cosmic reciprocity describing the exponential relationship between reckless action and consequential outcome.
definition: The principle positing that actions taken with disregard for consequences (Fucking Around) produce outcomes (Finding Out) that follow an exponential function: FO = FA² × K, where FA is the intensity of reckless action (1-10) and K is the Chaos Constant—a variable determined by context, ranging from mild social embarrassment (0.1) to reality-altering catastrophe (10). At high levels, the subject ceases to experience consequences and instead becomes a cautionary tale for others.

proofs.description: Universal human experience across all cultures, often invoked as warning before action and explanation after.
Aligns with concepts of karma, natural consequences, and the precautionary principle in risk management.
